prompt: Censor the names and profile photos of all players.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1. Apply a censorship effect to all player names and their corresponding profile photos or icons within the screenshot. Specifically:
- Censor the name 'june' and the gray circular profile icon, both located in the upper-middle section of the image.
- Censor the name 'simone' and the circular profile photo of a woman, both located in the mid-left section.
- Censor the name 'Storm' and the circular profile photo depicting a tornado, both located in the mid-right section.
- Censor the name 'Josh' and the circular profile photo of a man with a cat, both located in the bottom-center section.
objects: Dark gray scoreboard with game statistics (including 'You & [censored name]')
Censored circular player profile photos and icons (multiple instances)
Stacks of red-backed cards (next to players)
Chat bubble icon, small red diamond icon, and check mark icon (bottom-center)
